name: Spawn FX Rotator (cautious) g2
description: Generation 2 of the "mfx-cautious" lineage, spawned from epoch-2 top performer mfx-cautious with ±20% mutated parameters. Rotate cUSD/cEUR/cREAL via Mento when FX momentum beats round-trip cost + 34bps

spawn.fitnessFormula: fitness = annualize(V_end/V_start) - gas_penalty; reputation = clamp(round(50 + 500*(fitness - swarm_median)), 0, 100); inputs recomputable from Celoscan
